name: Keycloak
description: Open source identity and access management server with support for SSO, OAuth 2.0, and OpenID Connect.
questions: Does it support Okta as an external identity provider?
Is there an official hosted/cloud version?
Does it support fine-grained authorisation policies?
instructions: Focus on enterprise features, SSO integrations, Kubernetes operator support, and any changes to the licensing model.

alternatives.name: Auth0
alternatives.comment: SaaS-only, generous free tier, no self-hosting option.

alternatives.name: Authentik
alternatives.comment: Open source, self-hostable, modern UI, growing enterprise adoption.

alternatives.name: Zitadel
alternatives.comment: Cloud-native IAM, open source, strong audit logging.
